title: Write a docs note: do not use Tidewave MCP in test context
prompt: Write `docs/tidewave_boundary.md` describing that Tidewave MCP queries the DEV database, not the test database, and thus any rows observed via Tidewave are IRRELEVANT to reasoning about test state. Must state: (1) Tidewave is a dev-only tool, (2) test DB is isolated and always empty at the start of each test, (3) never use Tidewave output to fabricate expected test state.
tier_rationale: Documentation task with named tool and named boundary.
research_citation: "Claude doesn't understand this. It uses Tidewave's dev DB connection and thinks it's looking at the test DB — which is always empty." — BoothIQ
